kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-E2E-01

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/env.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens the application

kw.name: E2E Test1
Log in to Para Bank
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
logging in to Para Bank account

kw.name: Open Account
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain List
kw.doc: Verifies selection list ``locator`` is found from current page.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list '//select[@id="type"]' by label CHECKING.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('ENTER',) to //input[@value="Open New Account"] element.
Pressing special key ENTER to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Opening DIFFERENT types of accounts

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Login User
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bankApi, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/john/demo path_url=/parabank/services/bank/login/john/demo headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Verify login via REST API

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bankApi, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts path_url=/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 07:29:24 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e90fee7f03deba-BOM'} body=[{"id":13344,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":3922.93},{"id":13899,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":14121,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":200.00},{"id":14676,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15342,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15675,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19005,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19116,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19227,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19449,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19560,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Create Account via UI and Validate via API

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: Create Account via UI and Validate via API
